misc.title: #ONEPIECE1182 "For those born on high ground, the idea of water falling is terrifying." - Killingham, Ch: 1182 "Greenery and soil do not occur naturally in the sky. To us it is a blessing. This sacred
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1182 "For those born on high ground, the idea of water falling is terrifying." - Killingham, Ch: 1182 "Greenery and soil do not occur naturally in the sky. To us it is a blessing. This sacred land we call, "Vearth." - Gan Fall, Ch: 253 Typical Joe (@3SkullJoe) This reference to the Holy Land is the most important piece of context behind the connections between Enel & Imu. We learned in 253 that the reason Jaya is known as Holy Land is because of the rich soil. We get a hint that the same was originally true of Mariejois, through 908. — https://nitter.net/3SkullJoe/status/1579776804508012557#m
